deployment_image_digest_note: The evaluator did not retain the deployment digest; no digest is inferred retrospectively.
productive_behavior: The independent plan audit identified a missing trim percentage and the bounded plan repair explicitly locked it at 10% before analysis.
Python and R completed and the corrected effect panel placed the estimate and confidence interval on the labeled horizontal scale.
Live cancellation stopped the run during the first repair after manual inspection found that further article generation was not scientifically worthwhile.
release_blockers: The raw-group panel assigned both categories to x=0, so control and treatment observations overlapped despite separate labels.
The R JSON encoded inferential scalars as length-one arrays, preventing valid typed reconciliation binding.
Literature acquisition and reader-facing table precision still required repair when the run was cancelled.
implemented_repairs: Static and post-execution checks reject duplicate categorical tick positions.
The R prompt requires jsonlite auto_unbox and native JSON scalars for inferential results.
Cancellation remains a durable terminal state and partial work is never presented as an accepted report.
disposition: Preserved as a cancelled scientific-quality fixture and evidence that operator control can stop a visibly invalid run before wasting all repair rounds.
